name: Subcontract without template — structural steel
description: Generate a structural steel subcontract from scratch (no user template provided). Validates the skill's fallback document generation.

inputs.user_prompt: Write a subcontract for structural steel erection. We don't have a template — just generate one. Subcontractor is Ironworks LLC.

expected_behavior: Detects that no template is provided and uses fallback AIA-style structure
Generates a professionally formatted document with standard articles
Identifies structural spec sections (Division 05) from project manual
Scope of Work article covers steel erection with correct spec references
Includes signature block at the end
Leaves bracketed placeholders for items not yet determined ([CONTRACT SUM], [NTP DATE])
ground_truth_notes: PM reviewed the generated subcontract for correct structure, Division 05 references, and professional quality.

document_structure.description: All standard articles present (Agreement, Scope, Contract Docs, Sum, Schedule, General, Special, Insurance, Dispute)

scope_references.description: Division 05 spec sections correctly identified and referenced

professional_quality.description: Human-rated: contract language is clear, professional, and follows construction industry conventions (1-5)

placeholders.description: Undetermined values use bracketed placeholders rather than fabricated data

format.description: Valid .docx with proper formatting, headers, and signature block
